taxonomy: Cephalorrhynchus microcephalus is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. It is a plant that belongs to the genus Cephalorrhynchus, which is a small group of plants. The family Brassicaceae is a large and diverse group of flowering plants commonly known as mustards or crucifers. The classification of Cephalorrhynchus microcephalus is based on its morphological characteristics and genetic relationships with other plants in the Brassicaceae family. This classification helps to understand the evolutionary history and relationships of Cephalorrhynchus microcephalus with other plant species.
